project_name: Industrial UWB RTLS Anchor and Relay Control Station
source_prompt:
PROJE TANIMI VE AMACI:
Bu proje, endüstriyel sahalar için geliştirilmiş bir UWB (Ultra Geniş Bant) RTLS (Gerçek Zamanlı Konum Belirleme Sistemi) Çapa (Anchor) ve Röle Kontrol İstasyonudur. DWM3000 modülü ile milimetrik hassasiyette konum verisi toplar, ESP32-S3 üzerinden Wi-Fi/BLE ile merkeze iletir ve opto-izoleli röleler üzerinden yüksek güçlü endüstriyel cihazları tetikler.

GİRİŞ VE ÇIKIŞLAR (I/O):
- Güç Girişi: 100-240V AC Şebeke Girişi (HLK-5M05 ile izoleli 5V'a düşürülür) veya harici 5V DC Jack.
- RF İletişim: UWB (IEEE 802.15.4z) ve Wi-Fi / Bluetooth.
- Endüstriyel Çıkış: 2 Adet 5V 10A SPDT Röle Çıkışı (Vidalı klemens ile).
- Genişleme Portları (Sensör/Cihaz): I2C, UART ve Boş GPIO'lar (Kilitli JST-XH ve KF350 klemensler üzerinden dışarı aktarılmış).

ÖZEL FONKSİYONLAR:
- Tak-Çıkar Beyin: Ana işlemci (ESP32-S3), PCB'ye lehimlenmez; arıza durumunda lehimsiz değişim için 2x22 pin soketli DevKit mimarisi kullanır.
- Donanımsal Watchdog: TPL5010 entegresi, yazılım çökse dahi sistemi donanımsal olarak resetler.

Teknik Notlar:
YIĞIN (STACKUP) VE ÜRETİM KURALLARI:
- Katman Sayısı: 4 Katman. İç katmanlar kesintisiz GND ve VCC (Güç) düzlemleri (plane) olarak ayrılacaktır.
- Substrat Malzemesi: FR-4, TG150.
- Empedans Kontrolü: Top layer'daki DWM3000 RF anten yolu için 50Ω (Ohm) kontrollü empedans uygulanacaktır.
- Yüzey Kaplaması: RF performansı için ENIG (Daldırma Altın) kullanılacaktır.

YERLEŞİM (PLACEMENT) VE DRC KISITLARI:
- Soket Hizalaması: U1_Socket_L ve U1_Socket_R merkezden merkeze tam 25.4 mm mesafede ve %100 paralel yerleştirilmelidir.
- IC Mesafe Sınırları: Seviye çeviriciler (U6, U7, U13) DWM3000'e (U2) maksimum 10 mm uzaklıkta; 1.8V LDO regülatör (U5) maksimum 15 mm uzaklıkta olmalıdır.
- Dekuplaj: Tüm 100nF dekuplaj kapasitörleri, hedef IC'nin VCC pinine maksimum 5 mm yakınlıkta yerleştirilecektir.

YOL ÇİZİM (ROUTING) VE KORUMA KURALLARI:
- RF Yasak Bölgesi (Keep-Out): DWM3000 anten yolu (Pin 23 -> ANT1) etrafında ve altında 3 mm'lik bakır döküm/bileşen yasağı uygulanacaktır. Anten yolunda "via" kullanılmayacaktır.
- Güç Yönlendirmesi: AC-DC çıkışından (HLK-5M05) gelen 5V_MAIN hattı doğrudan U1 soketlerindeki DevKit 5V/VIN pinine gidecektir. DevKit'in 3.3V çıkış pini, doğrudan U5 LDO regülatörünün girişine yönlendirilecektir.
- Yüksek Voltaj İzolasyonu: AC giriş hattı (L ve N) ile düşük voltajlı DC bileşenler arasına PCB üzerinde fiziksel izolasyon yarığı (milling slot) açılacaktır.
assumptions: 4-layer PCB stackup with dedicated internal GND and VCC planes
50 Ohm controlled impedance for the RF microstrip on the top layer
ENIG surface finish for optimal RF performance
Physical milling slot for high-voltage isolation between AC and DC domains

components.reason: Left socket for ESP32-S3 DevKit to allow solderless replacement
constraints: Must be placed exactly parallel to U1_Socket_R
Center-to-center distance to U1_Socket_R must be exactly 25.4mm

components.reason: Right socket for ESP32-S3 DevKit to allow solderless replacement
constraints: Must be placed exactly parallel to U1_Socket_L
Center-to-center distance to U1_Socket_L must be exactly 25.4mm

components.reason: UWB Transceiver Module for high-precision RTLS
constraints: CRITICAL: Pin pitch must be exactly 1.0mm, NOT 1.27mm. Footprint must be generated with 1.0mm pitch for KiCad.
Keep-out zone of 3mm around and under the antenna path (Pin 23 to ANT1) with no copper or components.
No vias allowed on the RF trace to ANT1.

components.reason: Primary isolated AC-DC converter from mains to 5V
constraints: Place on the high-voltage edge of the board
Maintain 8mm clearance from low-voltage DC components

components.reason: Provides clean 1.8V supply dedicated to the DWM3000 module
constraints: Place within 15mm of U2 (DWM3000)

components.reason: Translates SPI signals (MOSI, MISO, SCK, CS) between ESP32-S3 (3.3V) and DWM3000 (1.8V)
constraints: Place within 10mm of U2 (DWM3000)

components.reason: Translates UWB IRQ signal from 1.8V to 3.3V
constraints: Place within 10mm of U2 (DWM3000)

components.reason: Translates UWB RST signal from 3.3V to 1.8V
constraints: Place within 10mm of U2 (DWM3000)

components.reason: Hardware watchdog to reset ESP32-S3 in case of firmware lockup
High-accuracy RTC for time-stamping RTLS events
Non-volatile storage for anchor configuration and calibration parameters
Industrial relay channel 1 for high-power device control
constraints: Isolate coil and contact traces with wide clearance

components.reason: Industrial relay channel 2 for high-power device control
constraints: Isolate coil and contact traces with wide clearance

components.reason: Galvanic isolation for Relay 1 control line
constraints: Place across the isolation barrier separating MCU and Relay domains

components.reason: Galvanic isolation for Relay 2 control line
constraints: Place across the isolation barrier separating MCU and Relay domains

components.reason: Drives Relay 1 coil from optocoupler output
Drives Relay 2 coil from optocoupler output
Reverse polarity protection for external DC Jack input
Flyback protection diode for Relay 1 coil
constraints: Place directly parallel to Relay 1 coil pins

components.reason: Flyback protection diode for Relay 2 coil
constraints: Place directly parallel to Relay 2 coil pins

components.reason: ESD protection for 3.3V main power rail
ESD protection for 1.8V UWB power rail
Overvoltage transient protection on AC mains input
constraints: Place immediately after the AC fuse F1

components.reason: Overcurrent protection for AC mains input
constraints: Place first on the AC Live line

components.reason: Resettable overcurrent protection for DC Jack input
RF output connector for external UWB antenna
constraints: Place on board edge
Connect via 50 Ohm coplanar waveguide

nets.reason: Fused AC Mains Live to AC-DC Converter
Main 5V DC rail supplying ESP32 DevKit and Relay Coils
Raw DC input from external power jack
Fused DC input before reverse polarity diode
Main 3.3V rail generated by ESP32 DevKit LDO
Clean 1.8V supply for DWM3000 RF module
50 Ohm matched RF path to SMA antenna
Isolated drive signal for Relay 1 MOSFET
Isolated drive signal for Relay 2 MOSFET
Watchdog Reset output to MCU EN pin

rules.description: Maintain minimum 8mm clearance between AC mains traces (AC_L, AC_N, AC_L_FUSED) and all low-voltage DC nets.
RF_ANT_PATH must be routed as a 50 Ohm coplanar waveguide on the top layer with continuous ground reference on Layer 2.
No copper planes, traces, or components allowed within 3mm of the RF_ANT_PATH trace on any layer.
U1_Socket_L and U1_Socket_R must be aligned perfectly parallel with a center-to-center spacing of exactly 25.4mm.
Level shifters U6, U7, and U13 must be placed within 10mm of the DWM3000 module (U2) to minimize signal degradation.

reasoning_log.message: Enforced critical 1.0mm pitch constraint on DWM3000 (U2) footprint to prevent assembly mismatch.
Added bidirectional level translator (U6) and single-channel level shifters (U7, U13) to bridge the 3.3V MCU domain and 1.8V UWB domain safely.
Implemented optocoupler isolation (U11, U12) and low-side MOSFET drivers (Q1, Q2) for the 5V industrial relays to protect the MCU from inductive spikes and noise.
Integrated TPL5010 hardware watchdog timer to monitor MCU state and trigger hard resets via the EN pin if firmware crashes.
Added input protection including AC glass fuse (F1), varistor (RV1), DC polyfuse (F2), Schottky diode (D1), and TVS diodes (D5, D8) to ensure industrial-grade reliability.

checks: Verified voltage domain isolation between 3.3V and 1.8V signals.
Confirmed presence of flyback diodes across relay coils.
Validated dual-input power path (AC-DC and DC Jack) with reverse polarity and overcurrent protection.
Checked that DWM3000 pitch constraint is explicitly flagged for CAD generation.
